message:
fix: default dolt-auto-commit to OFF instead of ON (dolt-test-24tt)

When dolt.auto-commit is unset, every bd write fired DOLT_COMMIT('-Am', ...)
even in server mode where individual commits are unnecessary. Under concurrent
load (16+ polecats) this caused manifest update contention pushing Dolt into
read-only mode. Callers should now opt-in to auto-commit rather than opt-out.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
